tweets.text:
Here’s a story the media would barely cover, and if they did, they certainly wouldn’t tie it back to immigration. 

CHP burns hours and taxpayer dollars chasing a black pickup missing a wheel, showering sparks through LA traffic at highway speed.  

Classic drunk driving that could’ve killed a family in seconds. They finally stop him, and it’s a young illegal alien on the ground.  

You’ve all likely become so desensitized to the invasion that you wouldn’t even realize this is all tied back to immigration. 

Under today’s low key targeted immigration enforcement, would he even have been caught ? 

Mass deportations aren’t extreme , they’re the reset we need.  NOW!! 🇺🇸 https://t.co/uj3SUqPOQ2

author.description: Retired Border Patrol Commander-at-Large. Spent 30 years doing the job politicians only campaign on. Now calling out their failures and offering real solutions.

tweets.text:
The missing migrant kids aren’t lost by accident. They’re buried inside a system deliberately built to be untraceable( Thanks Biden/Kamala/Mayorkas). 

Narrow investigations have failed for years for one simple reason, the bad actors are hidden inside a much larger illegal alien population.

The only way to find those children is wide-net mass deportation.

The Border Patrol actually cares about the kids.

A broad sweep forces every fake sponsor and trafficker into the open. 

Networks collapse. The surviving children get rescued.

The left says they care about the children.

Then support the one move that actually saves them. Mass deportations!

Sometimes the kindest solution is the bluntest tool.

This is it.

What am I missing?

tweets.text:
Pulling CBP from JFK, LAX, etc. admits defeat. 

Instead of forcing compliance, you retreat and hand them the win.

Even in Newark they’re hesitating with protests, hunger strikes, and slow action.

The green team shuts them down immediately.

This stunt delivers chaos and pain while sanctuary cities get to cling to their failure to comply.

Real winning is decisive enforcement. Not symbolic retreats.

tweets.text:
I don’t know who’s holding these guys back, but basic riot control starts with gas. 

This should’ve been over in 15 minutes. We’re now on day three. 

Secretary Mullin’s inaction is putting his own agents, the facility, and the detained aliens at risk. 

Hesitation isn’t compassion — it’s dangerous weakness.

author.description: Retired Border Patrol Commander-at-Large. Spent 30 years doing the job politicians only campaign on. Now calling out their failures and offering real solutions.

tweets.text:
Just landed in Newark and the love from you guys hits different. 

People stopping me left and right, shaking my hand, thanking me for the work — that’s what keeps me going. 

There’s definitely a silent majority out there. 

We will never give in to a silent few that make noise and destroy cities because the bulk of us see it our way. 

Real Americans who appreciate someone actually doing something about it. 

Grateful for every one of you. 

Let’s get this done. 💪

tweets.text:
Mass migration isn’t just an American 🇺🇸 crisis — it’s hitting every developed nation the same: strained housing, overwhelmed welfare, rising crime, and communities losing their identity.

From the streets of Paris to American cities throughout the country, from Stockholm to Sydney, the problems are identical. That’s why I’m at the Remigration Summit in Porto today.

The diagnosis is the same everywhere, so the solution must be too: remigration. Time to protect our societies. 🇪🇺🇺🇸”

tweets.text:
For those wondering why I’m such a hardliner on mass deportations, it’s stories like the UK grooming gangs. 

Young girls as young as 11 systematically drugged, gang raped by dozens of men for years, threatened with death, families terrorized, while authorities looked the other way to avoid ‘racism’ accusations.

Our politicians lack courage. 

They see predictable crimes coming and still choose to protect the perpetrators over their own people. 

That’s why remigration isn’t extreme, it’s necessary. Protect our kids first @elonmusk
